00100000000010000000000000000101   # addi $8, $zero, 5
00100000000010010000000000000110   # addi $9, $zero, 6
10001100000010000000000000000000   # sw $8, 0($0)
10101100000010100000000000000000   lw $10, 0($0)
00000001001010100101100000100010    add $11, $9, $10 #
00100001010011000000000000000100    addi $12, $10, 4
11111111111111111111111111111111   # (invalid instruction or halt)
00000000000000000000000000000000   # nop
